place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Sea-View Three-Bedroom Pool Villa with Office - Bophut
blurb: One of the last two villas in an intimate hillside village of six in Bophut, on Koh Samui’s north coast — a three-bedroom-plus-office sea-view home in warm stone and wood, with an infinity-edge pool and panoramic Gulf views. Fully furnished and ready to move into; 365 m² of build, freehold. From ฿21,500,000.
detail:
Set into the hillside in the Bophut area of Koh Samui’s north coast, this is an intimate village of just six contemporary villas — four already sold, with only two now remaining at ฿21,500,000 and ฿23,500,000.

Each is a stylish three-bedroom home with a dedicated office, of 365 m² total build (185 m² of living space), wrapped in panoramic glazing that opens to a breathtaking view of the sea — light shifting from the morning sun to a pink evening sunset. The architecture is warm and natural, in stone and wood, for an atmosphere of calm and comfort: an ideal choice for those who value naturalness and a quiet connection to the landscape.

The living spaces flow out to a terrace and a private infinity-edge swimming pool that appears to spill toward the horizon, with a tropical-island design carried through to the fully furnished interiors. Every villa comes with private parking, a deep well for its own water supply, and is handed over fully furnished and ready to move into.

Bophut is one of Samui’s most established and desirable areas, a short drive from Fisherman’s Village, the beaches and the island’s dining — a setting equally suited to full-time living or a turnkey holiday home.

features.l: Only two of six villas remain
